description: Fresh retained screen seed on current evaluator before new branch generation.

change_summary: Add a filtered fee-floor accumulator plus anchor spot, cut instantaneous event carry, and cap calm-side shared rebates while the floor is elevated.
decision_summary: delta -105.662641 did not clear promotion margin 24.327009
description: Replace part of the incumbent event repricing with a filtered volatility accumulator and exponentially decaying protective floor, while gating calm shared rebates when the floor remains elevated.
label: fee-discipline-vol-floor-v1

change_summary: Add a calm confirmation counter and spend passive/divergence opportunity cuts only after repeated benign gaps, with thresholded release signals.
decision_summary: delta 0.564841 did not clear promotion margin 20.067707
description: Keep the incumbent quote surface but gate calm-side release behind repeated benign confirmations and threshold the passive/divergence cuts so calm relief does not stay on broadly.
label: local-refine-concave-v1

change_summary: Carry forward calm-confirmation gating and add only a thin ultra-calm pre-confirmation passive release to recover low-vol retail without broad cheap quoting.
decision_summary: delta -0.728771 did not clear promotion margin 20.068388
description: Keep the calm-confirmation release gating from screen_0003, but add a very low-rate passive release only in ultra-calm regimes before confirmation engages.
label: local-refine-concave-v2

change_summary: Carry forward calm-confirmation gating and deepen only the fully confirmed passive release by slightly lowering its threshold and raising its rate.
decision_summary: delta 0.565591 did not clear promotion margin 20.067579
description: Keep screen_0003's confirmation gating and deepen passive release only after two calm confirmations, avoiding any pre-confirmation spend.
label: local-refine-concave-v3

change_summary: Add side-specific markout memory and rebate blockers on top of the incumbent latent spine; trim instantaneous burst coefficients to keep the asymmetric charge smoother.
decision_summary: delta -66.711285 did not clear promotion margin 26.976321
description: Add decaying side-specific markout memories, use them to tax only the toxic side, and block only that side's calm rebate path while slightly reducing the instantaneous burst surcharge.
label: anti-arb-markout-v1

change_summary: Port the screen_0005 calm-confirmation gate into a dedicated decaying relief envelope with a hard cap and break-trigger reset.
description: Add a bounded calm-relief envelope on top of the screen_0005 confirmation gate so weak-slice relief persists briefly after repeated benign gaps and then decays back out.
label: weak-slice-envelope-v1

change_summary: Add a protective-by-default router weight and a bounded competitive surface that trims event carry only after calm confirmations.
description: Bounded structural retry: keep the incumbent map as the protective surface, add a defensive router score, and blend toward a capped competitive surface only after repeated benign confirmations.
label: structural-router-v2
